channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: FBI seizing evidence at California plant where chemical tank overheated
item.description: Federal authorities served a search warrant on Wednesday at a Southern California aerospace facility where a chemical tank overheated last month, forcing 50,000 residents to evacuate because authorities feared an explosion.
item.content:encoded:
Federal authorities served a search warrant on Wednesday at a Southern California aerospace facility where a chemical tank overheated last month, forcing 50,000 residents to evacuate because authorities feared an explosion.

(Image credit: William Liang)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: U.S. military says it's striking 'multiple targets' in Iran in 2nd day of renewed fire
item.description: The escalating attacks threatened to derail efforts to end the war, with President Trump warning that Tehran would "pay the price" for stalled negotiations.
item.content:encoded:
The escalating attacks threatened to derail efforts to end the war, with President Trump warning that Tehran would "pay the price" for stalled negotiations.

(Image credit: Vahid Salemi)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Somali World Cup referee denied U.S. entry, hailed as hero at home
item.description: A World Cup dream denied — Somali referee Omar Artan receives a hero's welcome at home after being blocked from entering the United States and taking part in the World Cup.
item.content:encoded:
A World Cup dream denied — Somali referee Omar Artan receives a hero's welcome at home after being blocked from entering the United States and taking part in the World Cup.

(Image credit: Abuukar Mohamed Muhidin)
item.dc:creator: Emmanuel Akinwotu

item.title: Veterans and relatives see no place for Trump's arch near Arlington National Cemetery
item.description: Three Vietnam War veterans are suing to stop President Trump from building an arch just steps from Arlington National Cemetery, where 400,000 service members, veterans and their relatives are buried.
item.content:encoded:
Three Vietnam War veterans are suing to stop President Trump from building an arch just steps from Arlington National Cemetery, where 400,000 service members, veterans and their relatives are buried.

(Image credit: Eric Lee for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman

item.title: Report: ICE wasted millions, endangered detainees in largest immigration facility
item.description: Since the opening of Camp East Montana in Texas last year, immigration lawyers and rights advocates have expressed concerns about conditions inside the facility.
item.content:encoded:
Since the opening of Camp East Montana in Texas last year, immigration lawyers and rights advocates have expressed concerns about conditions inside the facility.

(Image credit: Morgan Lee)
item.dc:creator: Sergio Martínez-Beltrán

item.title: The theory taking the rich by storm: China funds data center haters
item.description: Tech millionaires claim China is behind a wave of local opposition to U.S. data centers, while providing little direct evidence.
item.content:encoded:
Tech millionaires claim China is behind a wave of local opposition to U.S. data centers, while providing little direct evidence.

(Image credit: Natalie Behring)
item.dc:creator: Geoff Brumfiel

item.title: Taiwan drills with U.S. rocket system, firing in China's direction
item.description: The drill on Wednesday marked the first time the U.S.-supplied HIMARS system has been fired into the Taiwan Strait.
item.content:encoded:
The drill on Wednesday marked the first time the U.S.-supplied HIMARS system has been fired into the Taiwan Strait.

(Image credit: Chiang Ying-ying)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Inflation tops 4% for the first time in 3 years on spike in gasoline prices
item.description: Inflation has surged to its highest level in more than three years since the U.S. and Israel launched their war on Iran, triggering a surge in gasoline prices.
item.content:encoded:
Inflation has surged to its highest level in more than three years since the U.S. and Israel launched their war on Iran, triggering a surge in gasoline prices.

(Image credit: Joe Raedle)
item.dc:creator: Scott Horsley

item.title: July 1 brings big student loan changes. Here's what you need to know
item.description: A popular (and generous) repayment plan ends, two new plans begin and many borrowers will see new loan limits.
item.content:encoded: A popular (and generous) repayment plan ends, two new plans begin and many borrowers will see new loan limits.
item.dc:creator: Cory Turner

item.title: U.S. and Iran exchange strikes. And, House passes ICE and Border Patrol funding
item.description: The U.S. and Iran have exchanged strikes after a helicopter was downed Monday near the Strait of Hormuz. And, House Republicans have passed a bill to fund ICE and Border Patrol through Trump's term.
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. and Iran have exchanged strikes after a helicopter was downed Monday near the Strait of Hormuz. And, House Republicans have passed a bill to fund ICE and Border Patrol through Trump's term.

(Image credit: Ryan Murphy)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton
